blocks.purpose: Bridge EdwardsPoint validity to ProjectivePoint validity. Establish sum_of_limbs_bounded for double() precondition.
double() postconditions directly satisfy as_extended() preconditions. Empty proof block.
Chain affine equivalences: as_extended ensures → double ensures → as_projective ensures. Show projective_point_as_affine_edwards(proj) == edwards_point_as_affine(*self).

approach: Pipeline proof: each block bridges postconditions of one call to preconditions of the next. Block 1 establishes projective validity from extended validity (same X,Y,Z) and limb bounds for sum_of_limbs_bounded. Block 2 is empty pass-through. Block 3 chains the affine representation equivalences.
notes: Verified successfully (no errors at R8 lines, 1969 verified in crate). NOTE: An automated process subsequently restored ground truth to edwards.rs, preventing clean verification of remaining Group B holes.
